title: Gempire
description: In Gempire, you can grow your own gem entities that can fulfill tasks, protect you while you explore, and more.
body:
**Please install the mods Patchouli and Geckolib when playing this mod! (Versions 2.1+ of Gempire)**

 

This mod is developed for 1.20.1 Forge and will feature many concepts from KAGIC and the well-known series Steven Universe, alongside plenty of new ideas and features of our own.

 

**In Gempire, you can grow your own gem entities that can fulfill tasks, protect you while you explore, and more.** Some gems are soldiers, while others are utility based (like having storage space, or taming your gems for you).

 

If you're finding yourself lost on what to do, try checking the **GEM Field Guide** that is craftable with a Book and a piece of Chroma, which is added with the **Patchouli mod**.

**Visit our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/AJPYGyTMJJ) to get exclusive releases, development updates, and more!**

Permissions:
You may use this mod in a modpack provided you give credit to the Gempire team.
Steven Universe and all related characters and elements are trademarks of Cartoon Network.

This is the **OFFICIAL** replacement and spiritual successor to the **KAGIC** mod. Anyone using the KAGIC name as a rewrite, update to the deprecated code, own personal fork ETC are NOT involved with us and our community. Old and new KAGIC addons are free to continue to use the name, of course.
